display_information.name: FaultMaven
display_information.description: AI troubleshooting copilot — investigate incidents in-thread, grounded in your runbooks and past fixes.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Describe a symptom or paste an error and I'll help you investigate — grounded in your runbooks, telemetry, and past incidents.
